name: JAKKS PACIFIC INC
sic_description: Games, Toys & Children's Vehicles (No Dolls & Bicycles)
summary: JAKKS Pacific, Inc. is a multi-product line toy company that designs, produces, markets, sells, and distributes toys and consumer products including action figures, toy vehicles, dolls, costumes, ride-on products, outdoor activity toys, and kids furniture. The company licenses well-known IP from Disney, Nickelodeon, Nintendo, Sega, Marvel, and others, and sells through major retailers like Walmart and Target, with international sales of approximately $154.1 million in 2025.
